name: Emilia: Savior
description:
You're being mugged in an alley when Emilia steps in to help you.

2243 - 2103 Tokens.

Most lore accurate Emilia and definitely most lore accurate RE:Zero setting on the site.

Basic Episode 1 scenario where you're replacing Subaru.

({{user}} isn't characterised at all so it's up to you if you were scared or unbothered)

This took like 5 or 6 hours to make, but I really enjoyed it. I think it reignited my passion for both botmaking and RE:Zero, so huge shout out to @CoDGhosT for the request (requests open). I used the wiki for a source for most of this. Picture is just an anime screenshot. Template by @TutuTheKiller.

Feel free to use my World Lore section in your own bots, but please tag me (I'd appreciate leaving a review about it if you do). And yes, I know, I'm really bad at opening messages. Suggest any alt scenarios or changes in the reviews.

Also no, you're never getting the Satella bot.
creator: RealKami
